plan_metadata.name: Sample Msgext Search Python Local Debug

parameters.text: Teams Messaging Extensions Search using Python

steps.description: Type text "Teams Messaging Extensions Search using Python" into the search input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit in Visual Studio Code, just below the "Featured samples" heading.

Click the "Create" button next to "Teams Messaging Extension" in the Samples list within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension sidebar in Visual Studio Code. And input ${{var:app_name:search-extension-settings}} into the run time variable.
Dismiss the "NOTIFICATIONS" panel in Visual Studio Code by pressing the Esc key.
